PIPELINE MODULES
TII-SSRC-23 PHASE 2 · 10 PROCESSING MODULES · INGESTION → SOAR
Total Modules
10
Implemented
Completed
9
Verified
Active
1
Running
Notebook Cells
258
Phase 2
1
Data Ingestion & Integrity (1.1–1.5)
  • TII-SSRC-23 loading, fuzzy column matching
  • 5-tuple reconstruction (IP/Port/Protocol)
  • Timestamp validation & temporal distribution
  • Label integrity audit & ingestion logging
COMPLETE
2
Data Cleaning & KNN Imputation (2.1–2.2)
  • Invalid/corrupted record removal
  • Inf/NaN sanitization
  • KNN Imputation (k=5) with RobustScaler
  • Before/after visualization export
COMPLETE
3
Isolation Forest Noise Filter (2.3)
  • Unsupervised outlier detection
  • Contamination tuning & inlier separation
  • Feature importance visualization
  • Filtered dataset export
COMPLETE
4
Deduplication & Normalization (2.4–2.5)
  • Duplicate flow removal via 5-tuple keys
  • Robust scaling & log normalization
  • Normalization summary CSV export
  • Distribution plots
COMPLETE
5
Feature Engineering (3.1–3.3)
  • Entropy-based feature computation
  • Temporal sequence encoding + sliding windows
  • Flow timeline & heatmap generation
  • Lag-1 co-occurrence matrix
COMPLETE
6
Graph & Node Embedding (3.4–3.5)
  • IP-level flow graph construction
  • Node2Vec 128-dim embeddings
  • Graph metadata & parameter logging
  • 2D embedding visualization
COMPLETE
7
Autoencoder & VAE (4.1A–4.1C)
  • Benign-mode Autoencoder training
  • VAE latent-space anomaly scoring
  • Reconstruction error thresholding
  • Latent vector CSV export
ACTIVE
8
Temporal Classification (4.2A–4.2B)
  • Sequential deep model for multi-class
  • Training history tracking
  • Softmax confidence scoring
  • Classification metrics CSV
COMPLETE
9
Meta-Learning Zero-Day (4.3A–4.3C)
  • Few-shot episode classification
  • Zero-day episode detection
  • Adaptation improvement metrics
  • Per-episode confidence reporting
COMPLETE
10
Temporal Voting & Risk Score (5.1–5.3)
  • Ensemble temporal voting 5/5 modules
  • Raw vs smoothed timeline plots
  • Contextual risk score computation
  • SOAR alert triage & prioritization
COMPLETE

Project Summary
Block-Defender Phase 2 is an AI-powered SIEM & SOAR pipeline for automated threat detection on the TII-SSRC-23 dataset. It combines VAE anomaly scoring, meta-learning zero-day classification, and temporal voting ensemble to automate SOC triage and contextual risk scoring.
Tech Stack
Python · Pandas · NumPy
Scikit-learn · TensorFlow/Keras
VAE Autoencoder · Meta-Learning
Node2Vec · Isolation Forest
KNN Imputer · RobustScaler
Matplotlib · Seaborn
